area.value: one item of a volume no greater than 10 cu. ft./level

description.value: This spell increases the hardness of materials by 1 point per 2 caster levels. The hardening spell does not in any way affect resistance to other forms of transformation. This spell affects up to 10 cubic feet per level. If cast upon a metal or mineral, the spell affects 1 cubic foot per level. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Chronicles Campaign Setting.
